name: Orange Granola Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together flour, baking powder, cinnamon, baking soda, salt, and cloves; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in egg.
3. Alternately stir in the flour mixture, orange juice concentrate, and honey until blended.
4. Stir in raisins, oats, and sunflower seeds.
5. Drop by tablespoonfuls about 2 inches apart on greased baking sheets.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Cool on a rack.
Makes 48 cookies.
